# Grandevu — grandevu.io
# Business automation platform for restaurants and craftsmen.
# "Do what you love. We handle the rest."

## What is Grandevu?
Grandevu is a vertical SaaS platform that automates business operations for restaurants and craftsmen (electricians, plumbers, carpenters, painters). One platform replaces 10+ separate systems.

## Key features
- Booking system (no commissions, customer owns all data)
- Staff management (scheduling, time tracking, contracts)
- Payroll calculation (automatic OB, tax tables, pay specs)
- HACCP food safety (daily temperature, hygiene, inspections)
- Invoice processing (AI-powered, automatic accounting codes)
- Accounting (VAT, Fortnox integration, audit-ready)
- Expense management (photo receipts, AI reads amounts)
- Contribution margin calculation (per dish/service/project)
- Quote & invoicing (ROT/RUT deductions, reminders)
- Menu management (digital signage, print, website in real-time)
- Time & mileage reporting (per project)
- Loyalty program (stamps + SMS campaigns)
- Compliance & GDPR (automated, always current)
- Legal guidance (AI-driven, included in Pro & Enterprise)
- Tip management (automatic distribution per staff)
- Reports & analytics (daily/weekly/monthly)
- Multilingual website (Swedish, English, German, Danish, Finnish)

## Pricing
- Starter: 990 SEK/month
- Pro: 1,990 SEK/month
- Enterprise: from 2,990 SEK/month
- Setup: customer's current total monthly cost (paid only when live)
- All plans: 3 months prepaid, free email support, monthly call included
